Application For Default Judgment By Court; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Jun-16-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Prove-Up Hearing as to defaulted defendants Statistical Zero Group LLC, a Delaware limited liability company, Wonky Musing LLC, a Delaware limited liability company, and Marquis Cabrera, an individual.
Dept. 514. Judge: Michelle Tong. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:53 a.m.

Stephen N. Ilg, Esq. appeared with plaintiff JoHannah Harrington, an individual, who was placed under oath and testified.
Both Mr. Ilg and Ms. Harrington appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendants Statistical Zero Group LLC, a Delaware limited liability company, Wonky Musing LLC, a Delaware limited liability company, or Marquis Cabrera, an individual.

Plaintiff's Complaint citing fourteen separate Causes of Action was filed on May 24, 2021 and personally served on defendants Statistical Zero Group LLC's and Wonky Musings LLC's Agent for Process on July 23, 2021.
Substitute service of plaintiff's Summons, Complaint and accompanying documents occurred on July 27, 2021, and was effectuated on August 7, 2021.
Default as to all three defendants was entered on November 18, 2021.
DOE defendants dismissed were dismissed on June 15, 2022.

Plaintiff JoHannah Harrington, a individual, submits the following exhibit for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Statistical Zero Group End of Year Bonus and Award Agreement...............ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff JoHannah Harrington, a individual,* and against the defaulted defendants Statistical Zero Group LLC, a Delaware limited liability company, Wonky Musing LLC, a Delaware limited liability company, and Marquis Cabrera, an individual, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $501,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $114,112.67.
Attorney Fees - $7,600.00.
Costs - $1,002.00.

Total - $623,714.67.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibit.

Proceedings concluded at 10:30 a.m.

*The Court awards damages on plaintiff's First, Seventh and Tenth Causes of Action for Misrepresentation About Employment Opportunity, Breach of Contract and Unfair Business Practices, respectively.
